mapper.select: select id, title, image_url as imageUrl, link_url as linkUrl, sort, enabled, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from home_banner order by sort asc, id desc
select id, title, image_url as imageUrl, link_url as linkUrl, sort, enabled, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from home_banner where enabled = 1 order by sort asc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into home_banner(title, image_url, link_url, sort, enabled) values (#{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sort}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: update home_banner set title = #{title}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, sort = #{sort}, enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id}
update home_banner set enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id}
